title: Tick Control in Kingsbridge, Bronx | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Kingsbridge, Bronx. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call (555) 555-5555 for a free quote!
intro: Kingsbridge residents face increasing tick problems due to proximity to Van Cortlandt Park and the neighborhood's tree-lined streets. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with targeted treatments for yards, gardens, and outdoor spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick management solutions tailored to Kingsbridge's unique residential landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kingsbridge for over 15 years, understanding the specific tick challenges posed by the area's parks, wooded areas, and older residential properties. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages.
localContext: Kingsbridge's proximity to Van Cortlandt Park, Ewen Park, and the abundance of pre-war apartment buildings with shared courtyards creates ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. We regularly service properties throughout the neighborhood, from homes near Broadway to residences along Sedgwick Avenue and the historic areas surrounding the Kingsbridge Armory.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: Kingsbridge's location near Van Cortlandt Park and numerous green spaces makes it a hotspot for tick activity. Ticks carry Lyme disease, Rocky Mountain spotted fever, and other serious illnesses. Regular tick control protects your family and pets, especially if you spend time outdoors or have pets that explore nearby parks and wooded areas.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Kingsbridge range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments, seasonal packages, and year-round protection plans. Contact us for a free inspection and customized quote for your specific property.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Kingsbridge, Bronx?
faqs.answer: In Kingsbridge, tick season typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round. We recommend preventative treatments in early spring and continued monitoring throughout the warmer months for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved tick control products that are specifically designed to be safe for families and pets when applied by licensed professionals. After treatment, we recommend keeping children and pets off treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry. Our technicians will provide detailed safety instructions specific to your treatment plan.
